gloss_en: The apple is sweet and beautiful.
notes: Apico-alveolar ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'sagarra' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; the apical/laminal sibilant contrast per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: I have seen seven white cats.
notes: Lamino-alveolar ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zazpi', 'zuri' — the Batua three-way coronal system per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: It is cold today in the mountain.
notes: Lamino-alveolar affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The small dogs are in the house.
notes: Post-alveolar affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txakur', 'etxean' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I drink cold water every day.
notes: Laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza', with a vowel-junction sandhi 'hotza edaten' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The blue sea is wide.
notes: Apico-alveolar affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'itsaso' vs laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zabala' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The rooster is singing in the morning.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'ollarra' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I am sick, I am in pain.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixoa' and laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'minez' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: My heart is pounding.
notes: Laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] 'bihotza' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The teacher gave me the book.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'andereñoak' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; vowel-junction 'liburua eman'.

sentence: Onddo eder bat aurkitu dugu basoan.
ipa: onɟo edeɾ bat auɾkitu duɡu bas̺oan
gloss_en: We found a fine mushroom in the forest.
notes: Palatal plosive ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' per hualde_lujanbio_zubiri2010.

gloss_en: A drop has fallen to the ground.
notes: Palatal plosive ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttantta' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'lurrera' per hualde_lujanbio_zubiri2010.

gloss_en: A little mouse runs by.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagu', ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txiki' and trill 'korrika' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: You must wash your hand.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskua' and laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] 'behar' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: Let us speak together.
notes: Laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] 'hitz', apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'hitz' → [hits̺] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The salt and pepper are on the table.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza', trill 'piperra' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'mahaian' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The big tree is losing its leaves.
notes: Laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] 'zuhaitz', 'handiak' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'galtzen' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The girl and the boy walk together.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'dabiltza' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The castle stands on the hill.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'gaztelua' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; coverage of the atonic-vowel profile per hualde_lujanbio_zubiri2010.

gloss_en: Have the village festivals begun?
notes: Laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] 'herriko', 'hasi', trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] and apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'festak' per hualde2018_aspiration.
